408.reason: The parser incorrectly treats 'int main' as a regular FuncDef. According to the grammar CompUnit -> {Decl} {FuncDef} MainFuncDef, the 'main' function must be reserved for MainFuncDef. By consuming 'int main(...)' here, the subsequent call to parseMainFuncDef() will fail (likely throwing an exception due to missing tokens), causing the program to crash before writing any output files. The condition should exclude the case where second.token.content equals "main".

The condition should exclude the case where second.token.content equals "main".
